form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Jilliby Jay Sea at Burnie over 1892m in a NR 45 or better on March 13 at $2.60. Raced better the start before that where she posted a big 14 m win after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Launceston (2:02.10) beating La Pierre in NR 40 to 44 on March 6 at $3.10. Should get every chance from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on two occasions free of interference.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 2190m at Maryborough, at the bell was 7th-12.8 beaten 9 m by Good Day (2:42.00) in NR 50 to 55 on April 10 at $51. Before that 4th (Fr6) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo, beaten 8 m by The Golden Hook (2:00.30) in NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $34. Hard to have on those efforts.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 2200m at Ballarat, at the bell was 4th-7.49 beaten 7 m by Muselet (2:41.50) in NR 49 to 52 on April 9 at $3.80. Before that, a game effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 7 m by The Golden Hook (2:00.30) in NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $5.50. Draws well so can show his best.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of two-and-a-half years. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Tossup at Boort over 2250m in a NR 45 to 55 on January 5 2024 at $7. Decent effort last start. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr1) over 2080m after showing early speed at Cranbourne was leading by 1 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Evileye (2:33.70) in NR 50 to 55 on April 3 at $3.50. Showed ability the outing before when he posted a big 7 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at Terang (2:02.30) beating Illawong Phoenix in NR up to 50 on March 2 at $1.75 at the bell was leading 4.7. Go well.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1650m after showing early pace at Bendigo beaten 23 m by Keayang Renegade (1:55.80) in 0W/15 0K stake on April 8 at $10. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo was 3rd-4.89 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Keayang Sweetheart (1:54.80) in 2-3 WINS on April 8 at $31. Winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Reared at start and refused to score up. The gelding trailed the field.
Inconvenienced near the 800m when Our Art Work was shifted wider.
Contacted its own sulky and broke gait passing the 200m.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 20 days ago at Terang over 1680m, before that 6th (Sr2) over 1710m at Ballarat was 6th-7.72 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Morris Brown (2:04.00) in NR up to 55 on March 19 at $6. Wait until the form picks up.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 2190m at Shepparton was 4th-8.95 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Elated (2:41.50) in NR up to 55 on March 24 at $5.50. Can be in the mix.
